allow: Bash(edge-tts --voice "en-US-BrianMultilingualNeural" --rate="+10%" --text "Five comes out next. i is one, not the first of the row. Don't print. Push its children if any." --write-media "public\\narration\\left-view\\step-8.mp3")

Bash(edge-tts --voice "en-US-BrianMultilingualNeural" --rate="+10%" --text "Five comes out next. i is one, not the first of the row. Don't print. Push its children if any." --write-media "public/narration/left-view/step-8.mp3")

Bash(edge-tts --voice "en-US-BrianMultilingualNeural" --rate="+10%" --text "Now we combine. The loop runs O of n times. Each pass does O of one work. Multiply them: O of n. The return outside adds O of one — but O of n plus O of one simplifies to O of n, because for large n the smaller term becomes negligible. Final time complexity: O of n." --write-media /tmp/ls-step4.mp3 --write-subtitles /tmp/ls-step4.vtt)
